title: tragopogon subalpinus
intro: Tragopogon subalpinus, also known as subalpine salsify or mountain salsify, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Tragopogon subalpinus lie in its roots, which contain inulin and other bioactive compounds, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in managing conditions such as arthritis and improving overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Tragopogon subalpinus can be made by infusing the roots in water or using them in tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
